summary: Iteration 241 - Registro Obblighi Fase 2 Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI displays new sources (F, G, H) and inline editing controls (owner_role, due_date, sla_source) properly.
critical_code_review_comments: obblighi_commessa_service.py: _make_obbligo correctly includes due_date and sla_source parameters
Source F (_collect_documenti_scadenza): Correctly creates alta/hard_block for expired docs, media/warning for expiring docs within 30 days
Source G (_collect_pacchetti_documentali): Correctly creates obligations for missing required docs and expired docs in packages
Source H (_collect_committenza): Correctly creates obligations from approved analisi_committenza with official_snapshot
ObbrighiCommessaSection.js: Properly displays owner_role badge, due_date, sla_source label, and inline editing controls
SOURCE_LABELS, ROLE_LABELS, SLA_LABELS constants are correctly defined for all new sources
seed_data_creation: Created test documents with expiry dates, pacchetto_documentale with missing/expired items, and approved analisi_committenza with official_snapshot
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registro Obblighi Fase 2 is fully functional. All 8 source modules (A-H) are working. PATCH endpoint accepts owner_role, due_date, sla_source fields. Frontend displays all new sources in filter dropdown and shows inline editing controls. Test session: obblighi_fase2_session_1774203898386, user_id: user_obblighi_fase2_1774203898386, commessa_id: commessa_fase2_1774203898386

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/obblighi/sync/{commessa_id} So: PASSED - Creates obligations for expired/expiring documents
PASSED - Creates obligations for missing/expired docs in packages
PASSED - Creates obligations from approved committenza analysis
api_endpoints_tested.Deduplication across all sources: PASSED - Second sync creates 0 new obligations
api_endpoints_tested.Auto-close when source fixed: PASSED - Obligations auto-close when pack item status changes to valid

frontend_components_tested.ObbrighiCommessaSection: PASSED - Renders with all obligations from 8 sources
frontend_components_tested.Filter dropdown (source): PASSED - Shows all 8 sources including Scadenze Doc., Pacchetti Doc., Committenza
frontend_components_tested.Inline role dropdown: PASSED - Shows all 6 roles, updates via PATCH API
frontend_components_tested.Inline date picker: PASSED - 8 date inputs found, updates via PATCH API
frontend_components_tested.Owner role badge: PASSED - Displays correctly (Uff. Tecnico, Amm.ne, Sicurezza, etc.)
frontend_components_tested.Due date display: PASSED - Shows dates with color coding (red for overdue, amber for soon)
frontend_components_tested.SLA source label: PASSED - Shows da scadenza, da pacchetto, da cliente labels

features_verified.Source F - Expired docs: Creates alta/hard_block obligation with due_date=expiry_date, sla_source=da_scadenza_documento
features_verified.Source F - Expiring docs (30 days): Creates media/warning obligation with due_date=expiry_date, sla_source=da_scadenza_documento
features_verified.Source G - Missing required docs: Creates obligation with blocking_level based on item.blocking flag, sla_source=da_pacchetto_documentale
features_verified.Source H - Obligations from snapshot: Creates obligations with category mapping, owner_role based on category, sla_source=da_documento_cliente
features_verified.Source H - Anomalies from snapshot: Creates obligations with ANOM_ prefix, owner_role from recommended_action
